reasoning: The chart configuration fails to answer the core part of the business question: 'Wieviel Umsatz hatte Teckentrup...'. The question asks for the revenue amount (total earnings) for the years 2021-2024. A line chart showing monthly fluctuations over four overlapping years makes it extremely difficult for a user to determine the total annual revenue or even compare year-over-year totals accurately without performing manual calculations. While the annotations provide some percentage changes and specific points, they do not state the actual total revenue figures requested. Furthermore, plotting all four years on a single x-axis representing months creates significant visual clutter ('spaghetti plot'), obscuring trends rather than clarifying them. A bar chart with aggregated yearly sums would be far more appropriate.
suggested_improvement: Change the chart type to a Bar Chart where the X-axis represents the Years (2021, 2022, 2023, 2024) and the Y-axis represents the Sum of Revenue ([Umsatz SD/CO]) for that year. This directly answers 'how much' revenue was generated per year.
